title: Classical-Quantum System Architecture Design Patterns
description: Master the fundamental design patterns for building robust hybrid classical-quantum systems. Learn layered architectures, interface contracts, and orchestration strategies for production quantum applications.
learningObjectives: Design layered architectures that cleanly separate classical and quantum concerns
Implement interface contracts between classical controllers and quantum backends
Apply common design patterns (Facade, Adapter, Strategy) to hybrid systems
Build orchestration layers for managing quantum-classical workflows
Evaluate tradeoffs between tight coupling and loose coupling in hybrid systems
